The IEA’s forecast expects data centre demand to grow four times faster than overall electricity demand, from around 500 TWh in 2025 to around 950 TWh in 2030. However, even at this rapid pace, data centres would account for less than 3% of global electricity demand by 2030, though regional impacts will differ significantly.
